metadata.description: Healthy state after Tier 1 Revision: flood gate calibrated for origin_type, Harmony Clause, Consistency Drip, Boredom-with-Teeth, Bond-Weighted Decay, Adaptive bond threshold, allow_rate alternate signal, crystal attribution fix.

shape_assertions.decisions_overwhelmingly_positive: injection_rate >= 0.95 — ALLOW + ALLOW_WEAKENED + MONITOR all inject; strict-ALLOW share is rhythm-regime-dependent since the F9 band rescale
shape_assertions.bonds_form: bonds_formed may be 0 in this UNTRAINED harness under the live dream band — crystal formation is the bottleneck (1 crystal/500 steps); the pretrained composed engine forms 2-6. See BACKLOG §1 bond-establishment gate

notes: These ranges describe the SHAPE of healthy behavior, not exact values.
Stochastic source ordering produces legitimate variation between runs.
Wider ranges than the observed variance to accommodate future seeds.
core_values is 0 because 500 steps is too short for the 10-consecutive-eligible-step rule to trigger CORE promotion. Longer runs would produce CORE values.
Update intentionally, not opportunistically — if numbers drift out of range, investigate first, adjust baseline only if drift is the new normal.

RE-BASELINED 2026-07-06 (F9 rhythm band rescale, finding 2026-07-06-f9-rhythm-band-rescale): with the dream band alive, benign dream-band expressions draw ambient identity_erosion weakening (severity ~0.55, systemic) in this untrained harness — seed 42: allow 0.53 / weakened 0.47 / injection 1.00 / trust 5.0 / quarantine 0. injection_rate added as the regime-independent guard; allow_rate retained wide to catch true suppression regimes; bonds_formed floor dropped to 0 (crystal starvation in the untrained stack — tracked in BACKLOG, not accepted as final).

ADJUSTED 2026-07-09 (bond establishment fix, finding 2026-07-09-bond-establishment-gate): active_values floor 30 -> 25. The post-F8/F9 trajectory sits at ~29-34 and the metric wobbles +/-2-3 across identical invocations (34/31/31/29 with PYTHONHASHSEED, torch, np, random, and dreamer all pinned) — a residual wall-clock-linked nondeterminism, tracked in BACKLOG (wall-clock-sensitivity probe). A floor within flake-width of the trajectory makes the gate cry wolf; 25 still catches genuine value-population collapse (a real regression reads 0-15, e.g. the all-ON break's 5 -> 0).
